scripts.build: set "RELEASE=prod"&& vite build && gcloud storage cp dist/js/dynamicLayout.js gs://projects.twreporter.org/twreporter/ddd/2026-07-kodokushi/js/dynamicLayout.js --content-type="text/javascript; charset=utf-8" --cache-control="no-cache" && gcloud storage cp dist/assets/image/* gs://projects.twreporter.org/twreporter/ddd/2026-07-kodokushi/assets/image/ --cache-control="no-cache" && gcloud storage cp dist/embed.html gs://projects.twreporter.org/twreporter/ddd/2026-07-kodokushi/embed.html --content-type="text/html; charset=utf-8" --cache-control="no-cache"
